subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God! His honor Mirza hath made mention of you in his letter, stating that, praise be unto God, ye have attained unto guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان حق جناب میرزا در نامه خویش ذکر شما را نموده که الحمد لله بهدایت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @humility; meekness; lowliness
